headline: Are bitcoin dividend ETFs setting the stage for $4T crypto race on Wall Street?
summary: Scott Melker discusses Franklin Templeton's filing to offer the first bitcoin (BTC-USD) dividend ETF, commenting on Wall Street's Dividend Reinvestment Plan (DRIP) strategy around cryptocurrency. "The Daily Wolf with Scott Melker" airs every day at 12:00 p.m. Tune in for your daily dose of all things crypto. Make sure to also check out Yahoo Finance's new crypto hub to find the latest crypto-related news.

headline: Is Bank of America Stock's Low Valuation a Bargain or a Warning Sign?
summary: BAC trades below peers on a P/S basis, but rising costs and a mixed earnings outlook may temper near-term upside despite growth drivers.

headline: Valence Launches Wealth Management Firm Built Around the Client, Not the Advisor
summary: NEW YORK, June 22, 2026--Valence today announced its launch, introducing a fundamentally new operating model for wealth management. Built on proprietary AI-native technology and a contrarian premise, the firm was founded on the belief that the future of the industry will not be defined by more investment offerings, more advisors, or new advisor tools. It will be defined by an entirely new approach built around the high-net-worth client’s personal and lived experience.

It will be defined by an entirely new approach built around the high-net-worth client’s personal and lived experience.

headline: Aluminum’s War Shock Blunted by Dark Transits and Chinese Supply
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The Iran war caused one of the biggest supply shocks to ever hit the aluminum market, but the runaway price surge that many were bracing for has been blunted by the ingenuity of producers from the Middle East to China.
